---
title: "BBS Access"
---

<img src="images/main_logo.png" class="centered-image">

## Connecting to GB7CAM BBS

This node runs a LINBPQ-based AX.25 mailbox system.

---

## Connect Command
C GB7CAM

---

## Services Available

- Personal messages
- Bulletins
- Node list (if linked)
- Forwarded mail (if configured)

---

## Notes

Access method depends on local RF or network configuration.
📬 4. mail.qmd
---
title: "Mail System"
---

## Mail Forwarding

GB7CAM supports AX.25 mailbox-style message handling.

---

## Features

- Local message storage
- Optional forwarding (if enabled)
- Inter-node routing via LINBPQ

---

## Message Format

Standard BPQ mail format is used for compatibility with other nodes.

---

## Status

Mail forwarding availability depends on node operational status.
